---
#title: "resources"
listing:
  contents: resources
  sort: "date desc"
  type: grid
  categories: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  feed: 
    categories: [R, Quarto]
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
#knitr:
#  opts_chunk: 
#    collapse: true
execute: 
  echo: false
---
![](images/favicon.png){.profile-pic fig-alt="logo, a simple graph resembling Edinburgh skyline" fig-align="center" width="33%"}

# [RESOURCES]{.second-color}
Interested in our courses, workshops, and events? Take a look at our variety of resources.
